title: Downtown view, Juneau, Alaska
description: View of downtown Juneau from across Gastineau Channel showing the compact city center backed by steep Tongass rainforest slopes, with commercial buildings, residential hillside, and the cruise dock.
alt: Downtown Juneau waterfront from across Gastineau Channel with steep forested mountains behind
